purpose: Verify warm production throughput before quoting it publicly (boundarylabs.org truth pass)
backend: genesis — Qwen3.6-27B GPTQ INT4 (AutoRound), vLLM Genesis-patched, TP=2, MTP n=3, max-model-len 65536
client: home-server (orchestration node), LAN, non-streaming, usage-based token count
method: greedy (temperature 0.0), max_tokens 1500, forced-length generation; wall-clock includes TTFT (~0.12s) and LAN round-trip
note: Measured against the live production server without stopping services — this is a serving-state sanity check, not an isolated experiment-mode benchmark. Short-run end-to-end (256 tok) measures ~67 tok/s due to TTFT amortization.
